creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 155959
svn diff fixes MASTER_SITES, and WWW

I use this as part of a larger project I'm working on.
I noticed it had gone missing. So I'd like to fix that.
I'm providing a mirror (MASTER_SITES), and am also
providing a working WWW.

The attached svn diff provides for the above.

NOTE: If the current maintainer is otherwise occupied,
Id be happy to be it's maintainer.

Thanks!

--Chris
